example: Dropping a folder already on the wheel highlights its existing tile instead of adding a duplicate

variants.focus: The existing tile bounces up in scale and settles. Quiet, cheap, reuses the tile's ScaleTransform.
An accent halo and border swell around the existing tile and fade. Draws the eye without moving the tile.
The existing tile shakes side to side. Most attention-grabbing, but risks reading as an error buzz.
The existing tile's face flushes accent colour and drains back. Unmistakable but the loudest option.
